professional_summary.overview: Senior Data Scientist with 11+ years of experience, including 8 years in Data Science and 3 years in Data Engineering, specializing in designing and deploying AI-driven solutions. Proven expertise in Machine Learning, Deep Learning, NLP, and predictive analytics, with hands-on experience in MLOps, model operationalization, and real-time anomaly detection. Adept at building scalable end-to-end ML pipelines, optimizing forecasting systems, and delivering innovation-led business insights that drive measurable outcomes.
key_highlights: Developed production-grade applications using Python, specializing in clean and optimized code for scalable AI and machine learning solutions.
Architected cross-functional solutions in machine learning, data engineering, and intelligent automation to improve business efficiency.
Translated complex data science methodologies into actionable strategies by applying advanced ML and AI techniques for decision-making accuracy.
Utilized predictive modeling and regression techniques to extract actionable business insights for key stakeholders.
Applied data mining and advanced statistical interpretation to solve complex business challenges through proactive exploratory data analysis.
Optimized machine learning models across diverse frameworks and deployment methodologies to ensure architectural adaptability.
Designed and deployed real-time anomaly detection systems to improve data quality and proactively identify business risks.
Built and automated end-to-end forecasting pipelines to accelerate demand prediction and drive operational planning value.
Applied Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO) to drive dynamic reorder optimization, significantly reducing inventory holding costs.
Leveraged transfer learning and pre-trained Transformer models integrated with LSTMs to optimize time-series forecasting accuracy.
Developed Generative AI solutions using GPT and LLaMA models, implementing prompt engineering and fine-tuning techniques.
Built Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) systems to enhance LLM responses using external knowledge sources and Model Context Protocols.
Applied LoRA-based efficient fine-tuning techniques to optimize LLM performance and inference efficiency with minimal overhead.
Streamlined model selection and hyperparameter tuning using AutoML to accelerate project timelines from conception to deployment.
Developed advanced recommender systems using collaborative filtering to drive personalization and increase business value.
Engineered multi-agent Deep Q-Learning strategies to optimize pricing decisions and drive measurable revenue increases.
Managed cloud infrastructure as code using Terraform to ensure scalable model deployment and infrastructure consistency.
Optimized AI solution scalability and cost-efficiency through extensive experience with serverless deployment on cloud platforms.
Spearheaded the integration of Natural Language Processing for real-time market reaction and competitive intelligence.
Uncovered actionable insights using advanced statistical analyses, A/B testing, and clustering techniques.
Developed executive-level visualizations and dashboards to communicate complex findings to non-technical stakeholders.
Collaborated effectively within technical teams using Git version control to ensure robust code management.
Adopted emerging data technologies like Apache Spark for large-scale AI workloads and distributed data processing.
Managed end-to-end AI deployment on AWS, leveraging SageMaker, Lambda, and EKS to drive business-critical solutions.
Applied Computer Vision and Deep Learning techniques for object recognition to transform visual data into actionable strategies.
Performed query optimization and performance tuning in SQL to ensure high-performance data retrieval for model training.
Developed interactive dashboards using Shiny and R to translate machine learning forecasts into accessible business tools.
Maintained high standards of collaboration and version control using GIT and GitHub to manage complex AI project lifecycles.
